enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of love and longing, portraying the emotional journey of the characters in the film.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

This song plays a significant role in highlighting the romantic moments between the lead characters in Irandam Ulagam.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song features the talented voices of Gopal Rao and Shakthisree Gopalan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mannavane En Mannavane was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 9, 2013.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mannavane En Mannavane, the characters express their deep emotional connection through a melodious duet that resonates with the theme of love. The soothing composition by Harrish Jeyaraj, combined with the heartfelt vocals of Gopal Rao and Shakthisree Gopalan, creates an atmosphere of romance and longing. This song beautifully encapsulates the essence of the film Irandam Ulagam, evoking feelings of nostalgia and warmth. It serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of love and celebration.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannavane En Mannavane from Irandam Ulagam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Gopal Rao and Shakthisree Gopalan, paired with Harrish Jeyaraj's soulful composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of this collaboration that elevates the emotional depth of the film.
stanzaMeanings: My king, my king, I will search and come back for you wherever you go. In the rain, in the rain, I will cry out here searching for you.
Until your little bird comes, I will be your companion. I will share this with you, but is there no name for this pain?
My king, my king, I will search and come back for you wherever you go. In the rain, in the rain, I will cry out here searching for you.
It will come, it will come, it will come as a companion. It will bring comfort, it will bring happiness. For one life, there are two bodies, and for two bodies, there is one heart.
In my heart, my heart is burning, do you know what it feels like? In a circle, in a circle, can the beginning end without saying anything?
Oh my king... My king, my king, I will search and come back for you wherever you go. In the rain, in the rain, I will cry out here searching for you.
It is like this, it is like this, it is like this, the moon is shining. It is like this, it is like this, it is like this, is it this or that?

I am moving in one direction, my heart is wandering in another direction. A wave, a wave, has fallen into the sea, and the form is also trembling. This is a promise, a promise, that has fallen into you, and the whole story has ended.
Oh my king, my king, I will search and come back for you wherever you go. In the rain, in the rain, I will cry out here searching for you.
Until your little bird comes, I will be your companion. I will share this with you, but is there no name for this pain?
